feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)

entry.title: The Sun guards his moon
entry.summary:
Author: chibithedragonkitty

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,972Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 44

Summary: A wealthy CEO in Metropolis wants the prince of Gotham, Bruce Wayne as his own. A very obsessive love but more of seeing Bruce as a possession, to be owned. Little does he know that a mild-mannered reporter secretly known as Superman isn't going to let that happen.

entry.title: A Little Sunshine
entry.summary:
Author: LuminescentWoollyBear

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,083Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: An alien appears in Metropolis and Bruce doesn't know what to do about it. Even more concerning, Bruce breaks his promise to himself to avoid unnecessary attachments and starts developing feelings for his new friend, Clark. But he just can't help gravitating towards the earnest kindness and protective warmth of the other. If he isn't careful, Bruce might even start trusting him.

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,382Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 78

entry.title: Face My Fears
entry.summary:
Author: MysticRose1992

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 73,487Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 3,594

Summary: During what Red Hood thought was just a routine check of all of the warehouses in his territory, making sure no new gang was going to start a gang war, he stumbles upon a scene that would haunt his nightmares. A Death Cult about to sacrifice a child that could be no older than 4. After dealing with the cult members, Jason finds himself the new caretaker of a 4 year old toddler that also happens to be able to turn invisible when startled. What could possibly go wrong?

entry.title: Bastard of Krypton
entry.summary:
Author: Jayden_Jones (KoaKillianAZ)

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,787Chapters: 1/25Kudos: 17

Summary: Almost thirty years after the near destruction of Krypton, the tensions between the noble houses and the high council can be felt now more than ever. Dru-Zod is gathering too much power, and the threat of a Civil War can be felt now more than ever. The House of El is the only one strong enough to stop him. Unfortunately, house of El is not in a good place nowadays. The lord of House El, Jor-El is now an elderly man, but his son Kal-El can't take his place because he refuses to get married and have children for a reason Jor-El doesn't quite understand. Jor-El is about to give up and name his niece Kara as his heir, until in a trip to earth he meets a boy named Richard. This is no ordinary child, but Kal-El's bastard son. Even so, that doesn't stop Jor-El from seeing the boy as the perfect heir. The only problem? Richard's mother is a Human male, who is not willing to let his boy go.

entry.summary:
Author: sweethoneysuckle (blea_my)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,702Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 66

entry.title: Most Dangerous Game
entry.summary:
Author: madame_bingo

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,568Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: Clark was sweating. Superman was sweating. It was as unnatural as it was unnerving. They were both still wearing the cuffs around their wrists, and their ankles were latched to the platform beneath them. The alien on the hovering platform garbled something that Bruce didn’t quiet understand, then clicked a button on the remote and the bonds holding he and Clark in place fell away. Bruce tensed instantly, prepared to defend against the first attack, and beside him Clark did the same.orCaptured and deposited on a red-sun planet, Bruce and Clark are hunted for sport.

entry.title: How Long Has This Been Going On?
entry.summary:
Author: bigmouthstrikes_again

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,165Chapters: 2/10Kudos: 29

Summary: “On the roof. I know what it was,” The boy said. “What was it? What did you see?” Clark said, glancing around. “It was Death I think?” He replied. “Death? What does that mean?” “Death was watching,” John began matter of factly, raising a hand to point behind Clark, “Death was watching and he was looking at you.” Quickly, Clark whipped his head to look in the direction John was pointing. He turned just quickly enough to see a wisp of black disappear behind a building. OR Batman stalks the hell out of Superman. Bruce Wayne is intrigued by Clark Kent. Superman is horrified by Batman. Bumbling reporter Clark Kent can’t seem to figure Bruce Wayne out. Identity mishaps occur. Idea from @lescrenti ‘s TikTok!New chapter every other day

entry.title: Two Heroes and a Baby
entry.summary:
Author: xxEmilee_Lunaxx

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 93,642Chapters: 26/?Kudos: 506

Summary: In this AU, 19-year-old Bruce Wayne adopts 4-year-old Dick Grayson after he is orphaned by a tragic event at Haly's Circus. Bruce is in over his head trying to juggle establishing himself as a responsible and valuable asset to Wayne Enterprises, beginning his vigilante work in Gotham as The Batman, and parenting a young child despite not knowing where to start. After struggling to get good press and constantly being seen as an irresponsible nepo baby, he sets up an interview at The Daily Planet. That's where he meets 19-year-old intern Clark Kent, who is eager to write a good story to begin his career as a journalist. After Clark agrees to keep an eye on Dick during his interview, Bruce realizes he has a knack for watching children, especially young Dick Grayson. Bruce asks Clark to come live with him at Wayne Manor on a 6 month assignment as Dick's nanny, and in return, will let Clark write the story of a lifetime--an expose on his life that no other reporter has even come close to. Clark reluctantly agrees, but is hiding a secret from Bruce--his life as the superhero, Superman! As the two begin their friendship and double lives as heroes, they learn valuable lessons in friendship, love, and parenting.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Eternity
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,112Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 42

Summary: On a cruise ship, Clark Kent's Kryptonian biology recognizes something in Bruce Wayne that even Bruce doesn't see: kor'va—soul recognition. The moment one consciousness knows another will change everything. Three years later, they undergo ra'sh'mora, the ancient Kryptonian bonding ritual. It's not marriage. It's a permanent quantum entanglement of two nervous systems. Clark feels Bruce constantly—his heartbeat, his emotions, his presence. They are never alone again. Then Bruce's heart starts failing.

entry.title: Am I making you feel Sick
entry.summary:
Author: fanofthegirl

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,928Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 272

Summary: Hal Jordan was dying long before a mission went wrong and his heart finally gave out. He was dying when he signed the divorce papers. Dying without making it anyone else’s problem. No one Noticed.Not Bruce. Not Clark. Not the Justice League. And Hal was fine with that because twenty months ago he signed away the right to have anyone worry about him. He would have kept it that way, too If he hadn’t burned himself out saving the world. If he hadn’t collapsed hard enough that everyone finally had to look. Now Bruce and Clark are hovering like they never spent nearly two years avoiding him. Acting like this is their burden to carry, like they didn’t already decide, once, that letting him go was easier than staying. Hal doesn’t understand it. There’s no cure. If Oa hasn’t found one, there’s no point in pretending otherwise. He’s made peace with dying. Bruce and Clark haven’t. They refuse to give up on him the way they gave up on the marriage. And that more than the poison in his blood or the ache in his chest is what hurts the most. Because Hal is still in love with them. And loving them while they fight to save him might be the one thing he can’t survive.
